creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
When I tried to rebuild devel/amd64-gcc as of -r429714 after the change
to 6.3.0 (first time rebuild after 6.2.0) I got:

===>   Registering installation for amd64-gcc-6.3.0 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/obj/portswork/usr/ports/devel/amd64-gcc/work/stage/usr/local/lib/gcc/x86_64-unknown-freebsd12.0/6.3.0/include/pcommitintrin.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/amd64-gcc




Context:

# uname -apKU
FreeBSD FreeBSDx64 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #7 r310556M: Mon Dec 26 16:49:53 PST 2016     markmi@FreeBSDx64:/usr/obj/amd64_clang/amd64.amd64/usr/src/sys/GENERIC-NODBG  amd64 amd64 1200019 1200019

(So this was not a cross-build context despite it being devel/amd64-gcc .)

# svnlite info /usr/ports/ | grep "Re[plv]"
Relative URL: ^/head
Repository Root: svn://svn.freebsd.org/ports
Repository UUID: 35697150-7ecd-e111-bb59-0022644237b5
Revision: 429714
Last Changed Rev: 429714
